enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enge Ponai?

The song expresses feelings of longing and searching for a loved one who has gone away.

What is the context of this song in the movie Jeeva?

This song reflects the protagonist's emotional turmoil and yearning for connection amidst challenges.

Who is the singer of Enge Ponai?

The song is sung by the legendary S.P.Balasubramaniyam.

Who composed the music for Enge Ponai?

The music for this song was composed by D.Imman.

When was Enge Ponai released?

The song was released on September 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enge Ponai, the protagonist expresses a deep sense of loss and yearning for a loved one who has disappeared from their life. The melancholic melody, beautifully rendered by S.P.B., evokes a profound emotional response, making it relatable to anyone who has faced heartbreak. The song's lyrics convey a sense of searching and longing, encapsulating the essence of love and separation. Overall, it serves as a poignant reminder of the emotional complexities of relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enge Ponai is a soul-stirring melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With the legendary voice of S.P.Balasubramaniyam and the enchanting composition by D.Imman, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced separation. Dive into the emotional depth of Jeeva and let the music take you on a heartfelt journey.
stanzaMeanings: Where have you gone, who are you searching for? Where have you gone, you have left me.
Searching for a dream, my heart has sunk, searching for greatness, it has drowned in darkness. Come back, come back, come back, come back.
Where have you gone, who are you searching for?
Yesterday morning we laughed together, yesterday evening we cried, has the bond ended?
Every day, do the losses feed on me, are the eyes that saw me burning in fire?
Come back, come back, come back, come back.
Where have you gone, who are you searching for? Where have you gone, you have left me.
From now on, there will be no tears in my eyes. From now on, there will be no one in my world.
Come back, come back, come back, come back.
